name: computed-inverse-pattern
description: System auto-generates computed arrays from inverse relationships. Declaring 'organization: Organization' (single ref) on Team automatically creates 'teams: Team[]' view on Organization. Marked with x-computed: true and x-inverse in JSON Schema. Filter logic in helpers-model-builder.ts:271-289.
relevantCode: collection.all().filter((item) => { const ref = item[viewConfig.inverse]; return ref === self || (ref && ref.id === self.id) })
recommendation: Leverage for 4-level chain: Org.teams, Team.children, Team.apps, App.memberships are all computed from inverse single references.
